[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: USA Santos chocolate production spec (MD + PDF)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/648
  
  Details:
  # USA Santos chocolate production specification (MD + PDF)
  
  Generated a planning-phase requirement specification document for Santos (Brazil
  production), to be relayed via Fatima Toledo, covering recurring conversion of
  Agroverse cacao into finished 81% chocolate bars for the USA market.
  
  ## What changed
  - **USA_SANTOS_PRODUCTION_SPEC.md** — requirement spec: 81% cacao / 19% cane
    sugar (two ingredients only), 50g bars, 100kg (~2000 bars) per cycle, twice
    yearly on the equinoxes (Mar 20 / Sep 20). Marked planning phase — do not
    execute — pending inspection of last year's bars on arrival in San Francisco.
    Documents supply/return responsibilities: Matheus/Black King (CNPJ) as Brazil
    logistics coordinator + exporter; TrueTech Inc supplies branded packaging at
    production time; Santos provides labor + internal foil and returns bars +
    cacao-tea residue + our Cabrellon mold.
  - **USA_SANTOS_PRODUCTION_SPEC.pdf** — Saffron Monk brand PDF with embedded
    Cabrellon mold reference image.
  - **scripts/build_usa_santos_production_spec_pdf.py** — overlap-safe PDF
    generator (fixed table layout, cell wrapping, page-break-inside avoid).
  - **PDF_STYLE_CONVENTION.md** — added binding Overlap safety section + checklist
    item so future PDFs inherit these rules.
  - **assets/cabrellon-mold.png** — mold reference image.
  
  ## Why
  Gives Fatima a clean, brand-consistent spec to review with Santos while keeping
  it explicitly non-binding until the viability inspection completes.
  
  ## Pull requests
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/648
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
